sub_modules.bpf_coeff_rom: Combinational ROM that returns the fixed signed Q15 coefficient for each of the 101 FIR tap positions.
sub_modules.bpf_tap_product: Combinational signed multiplier for one delayed input sample and one Q15 FIR coefficient, widened to a 64-bit product.
sub_modules.bpf_q15_normalizer: Combinational Q15 output scaler that arithmetic-right-shifts the signed 64-bit accumulator by 15 bits and returns the configured output width.
